tdd_tests.details: 1. In tui/src/app.rs, add WMax to TimeWindow enum. Add a test 'test_time_window_max' verifying next_window cycles to WMax. 2. Add 'pub fn previous_metric(&mut self)' (with unimplemented!()) and write a failing test 'test_previous_metric' verifying it cycles backwards.

tdd_implementation.details: 1. Implement App::previous_metric() in tui/src/app.rs. 2. Implement the logic for WMax in next_window. 3. Update main.rs to handle KeyCode::BackTab (which maps to Shift+Tab) and call app.previous_metric(). Ensure 'cargo test' passes in tui/.
